title: EQ - Changes to EQ settings are heard in real time
scenario: Verify that real-time EQ setting changes (presets and custom sliders) are audibly reflected in playing music.
steps: Start the app with a device that supports EQ.
Go to Device Settings and tap on the EQ tab.
Change between Bass, Flat, and Bright settings — changes in the music should be noticeable.
Switch to Custom EQ and move sliders around — changes in music should be noticeable (note: user must release the slider for changes to take effect).
expected: Changes to EQ settings are heard in real time.
